items.title_en: Alabama asks Supreme Court to allow congressional map that dilutes Black vote
items.title_zh: 阿拉巴马州要求最高法院允许淡化黑人选票的国会地图
items.desc_en: A three-judge panel in Birmingham, Alabama, found that the state's proposed map of House districts was 'intentionally discriminatory."
items.desc_zh: 阿拉巴马州伯明翰的一个三名法官组成的小组发现，该州提议的众议院选区地图“故意具有歧视性”。

items.title_en: This under-the-radar entertainment stock is trying to break to new highs, charts say
items.title_zh: 图表显示，这只不为人知的娱乐股正试图突破新高
items.desc_en: If Live Nation can finally break above its most recent resistance line and push toward new highs, it could complete a bullish formation.
items.desc_zh: 如果 Live Nation 最终能够突破最近的阻力线并推向新高，它可能会完成看涨形态。

items.title_en: Bank of America says prepare for a 'summer correction’ after rally to record highs
items.title_zh: 美国银行表示，在涨势创历史新高后，准备迎接“夏季调整”
items.desc_en: The bank said several technical indicators suggest the advance is becoming stretched, prompting a shift away from chasing gains and toward protecting them.
items.desc_zh: 该行表示，多项技术指标表明涨势正在变得紧张，促使投资者从追逐收益转向保护收益。

items.title_en: Abercrombie shares jump 13% on earnings beat even as Iran conflict hits sales
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗冲突影响了销售，但 Abercrombie 股价仍因盈利超出预期而上涨 13%
items.desc_en: Abercrombie & Fitch saw sales in Europe, Middle East and Africa decline by 10%, thanks in large part to the conflict in the Middle East.
items.desc_zh: Abercrombie & Fitch 在欧洲、中东和非洲的销售额下降了 10%，这在很大程度上要归功于中东的冲突。

items.title_en: Boeing CEO says company met requirements to increase 737 Max production to 47 jets per month
items.title_zh: 波音公司首席执行官表示，公司满足了将 737 Max 产量增加到每月 47 架的要求
items.desc_en: Boeing CEO Kelly Ortberg said the company has met FAA requirements to ramp up its production of 737 Max aircraft to 47 per month.
items.desc_zh: 波音公司首席执行官凯利·奥特伯格表示，该公司已满足美国联邦航空局 (FAA) 的要求，将 737 Max 飞机的产量提高到每月 47 架。

items.title_en: Jamie Dimon says JPMorgan Chase could spend $20 billion on acquisition: 'We are on the lookout'
items.title_zh: 杰米·戴蒙 (Jamie Dimon) 表示摩根大通可能斥资 200 亿美元进行收购：“我们正在密切关注”
items.desc_en: A $20 billion deal would be among the largest in JPMorgan's history and could invite regulatory scrutiny given its position as the largest U.S. bank by assets.
items.desc_zh: 这笔 200 亿美元的交易将是摩根大通历史上规模最大的交易之一，鉴于其作为美国资产最大银行的地位，可能会引发监管审查。

items.title_en: Amazon starts selling its AI shopping technology to other retailers
items.title_zh: 亚马逊开始向其他零售商出售其人工智能购物技术
items.desc_en: Amazon said it's already signed up Kate Spade as a customer for its AI shopping technology.
items.desc_zh: 亚马逊表示，它已经与 Kate Spade 签约成为其人工智能购物技术的客户。

items.title_en: U.S. oil falls below $89 on report Iran agreement would restore Hormuz traffic in one month
items.title_zh: 伊朗协议将在一个月内恢复霍尔木兹交通，美国油价跌破 89 美元
items.desc_en: U.S. crude oil prices fell about 6% Wednesday on a report Iran would restore traffic through the Strait of Hormuz as part of a framework deal with the U.S.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，作为与美国框架协议的一部分，伊朗将恢复霍尔木兹海峡的交通，周三美国原油价格下跌约 6%。

items.title_en: Ghana welcomes Pope's apology over Catholic Church's role in slavery
items.title_zh: 加纳欢迎教皇就天主教会在奴隶制中所扮演的角色道歉
items.desc_en: The West African nation was one of the main gateways for the transatlantic slave trade.
items.desc_zh: 这个西非国家是跨大西洋奴隶贸易的主要门户之一。

items.title_zh: 老挝洞穴被淹一周后，五人被发现生还

items.desc_zh: 救援人员称，对另外两名仍然失踪的村民的搜寻仍在继续。

items.title_en: Goldman raises its S&P 500 year-end forecast. It's for one simple reason
items.title_zh: 高盛上调标准普尔 500 指数年终预测。这只是一个简单的原因
items.desc_en: The bank raised its year-end S&P 500 target to 8,000 from 7,600 because of expectations for booming earnings growth.
items.desc_zh: 由于盈利增长预期强劲，该银行将标准普尔 500 指数年终目标从 7,600 点上调至 8,000 点。

items.title_en: South Korea detains dissident who fled China in rubber boat
items.title_zh: 韩国拘押乘橡皮艇逃离中国的异见人士
items.desc_en: Dong Guangping, an activist and former police officer, spent hours at sea before reaching Korean waters.
items.desc_zh: 活动人士、前警察董广平在抵达韩国水域之前在海上度过了几个小时。

items.title_en: Republicans stare down inflation abyss with midterms fast approaching
items.title_zh: 中期选举临近，共和党人凝视通胀深渊
items.desc_en: Republicans are struggling to find a clear message to battle high prices as President Trump pushes for funding for a White House ballroom.
items.desc_zh: 随着特朗普总统推动为白宫舞厅提供资金，共和党人正在努力寻找明确的信息来对抗高价格。

items.title_en: Mortgage refinance demand drops 18% as rates hit highest level since August
items.title_zh: 利率触及 8 月以来最高水平，抵押贷款再融资需求下降 18%
items.desc_en: Mortgage rates rose to the highest level in 9 months, hitting refinance demand hardest. Homebuyers also pulled back but were still more active than last year.
items.desc_zh: 抵押贷款利率升至 9 个月以来的最高水平，对再融资需求造成最严重的打击。购房者也有所回落，但仍比去年更加活跃。

items.title_en: Ebola-hit DR Congo faces 'catastrophic collision' of disease and conflict, WHO warns
items.title_zh: 世卫组织警告称，遭受埃博拉病毒袭击的刚果民主共和国面临疾病与冲突的“灾难性碰撞”

items.title_en: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
items.title_zh: 色情公司因年龄检查失败被 Ofcom 罚款 60 万英镑
items.desc_en: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，Youngtek Solutions Ltd 在 2025 年 7 月至 9 月期间没有进行检查，但此后进行了验证。

items.title_en: Woman caught after 30 years on the run is jailed for armed robberies
items.title_zh: 女子逃亡30年后被捕，因持械抢劫被判入狱
items.desc_en: Klette was finally caught in a flat in Berlin in 2024 after more than 30 years on the run and put on trial last year.
items.desc_zh: 经过 30 多年的逃亡，克莱特终于于 2024 年在柏林的一套公寓中被捕，并于去年接受审判。

items.title_en: UK spy chief: Time is running out for the West to confront threats from Russia and China
items.title_zh: 英国情报局长：西方应对俄罗斯和中国威胁的时间已经不多了
items.desc_en: Britain and its allies face a “moment of consequence,” according to the head of its intelligence agency.
items.desc_zh: 英国情报机构负责人表示，英国及其盟友面临着“后果严重的时刻”。

items.title_en: Russia to allow its central bank to down drones as Moscow struggles to defend against attacks
items.title_zh: 由于莫斯科难以防御袭击，俄罗斯允许其央行击落无人机
items.desc_en: Russia's State Duma has passed a law allowing certain financial institutions to operate anti-drone defense systems after attacks on its territory.
items.desc_zh: 俄罗斯国家杜马通过了一项法律，允许某些金融机构在其领土遭受袭击后运行反无人机防御系统。

items.title_en: Major film union in India calls for boycott of superstar Ranveer Singh
items.title_zh: 印度主要电影联盟呼吁抵制超级巨星兰维尔·辛格
items.desc_en: Singh is facing industry backlash over his decision to exit from the upcoming Bollywood film Don 3.
items.desc_zh: 辛格因退出即将上映的宝莱坞电影《唐 3》而面临业界强烈反对。

items.title_en: First Ghanaians set to be repatriated from South Africa over anti-immigrant protests
items.title_zh: 第一批加纳人因反移民抗议将被从南非遣返
items.desc_en: It follows recent protests against illegal immigration that have led to fears there could be a resurgence in xenophobic violence.
items.desc_zh: 此前，最近针对非法移民的抗议活动引发了人们对仇外暴力可能死灰复燃的担忧。

items.title_en: Attorney General Ken Paxton routs  veteran incumbent Cornyn in Texas Senate primary
items.title_zh: 总检察长肯·帕克斯顿在德克萨斯州参议院初选中击败现任老将科宁
items.desc_en: The race will help determine whether Democrats can win back control of the US Senate for the last half of the Trump presidency.

items.title_en: One killed and others missing after chemical explosion at US paper mill
items.title_zh: 美国造纸厂发生化学爆炸，造成一人死亡、多人失踪
items.desc_en: Nine others were injured and another nine are missing after a tank ruptured at a paper mill in Longview, Washington.
items.desc_zh: 华盛顿州朗维尤一家造纸厂的储罐破裂，造成九人受伤，另有九人失踪。

items.title_en: YouTuber arrested for allegedly using AI to defame Korean actor
items.title_zh: YouTuber 因涉嫌使用人工智能诽谤韩国演员而被捕
items.desc_en: The YouTuber allegedly made false claims that fuelled a career-ending scandal for Kim Soo-hyun.
items.desc_zh: 据称，这位 YouTuber 的虚假言论引发了金秀贤职业生涯终结的丑闻。

items.title_en: Hotels can refuse to give tap water to tourists, Italy's top court rules
items.title_zh: 意大利最高法院规定酒店可以拒绝向游客提供自来水
items.desc_en: The Italian Supreme Court rejected a tourist's claim that her consumer rights were breached when she was only offered €7 bottled mineral water.
items.desc_zh: 意大利最高法院驳回了一名游客的申诉，称她只获得了 7 欧元的瓶装矿泉水，从而侵犯了她的消费者权利。

items.title_en: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos could put her out of business
items.title_zh: 道德黑客冠军警告像 Mythos 这样的人工智能工具可能会让她破产
items.desc_en: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.
items.desc_zh: Chompie 是世界顶级道德黑客之一，她表示像 Claude Mythos 这样的人工智能将使像她这样的人更难竞争。

items.title_en: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
items.title_zh: 凯恩和哈兰德的 Instagram 投注广告被禁止
items.desc_en: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.
items.desc_zh: 广告监管机构表示，以顶级足球运动员为主角的广告对 18 岁以下青少年有很强的吸引力。

items.title_en: Three killed and dozens injured in Israeli strike on Gaza City, medics and witnesses say
items.title_zh: 医务人员和目击者称，以色列对加沙城的袭击造成三人死亡、数十人受伤
items.desc_en: Israel says it was targeting a Hamas commander whose predecessor was killed in a similar strike earlier in May.
items.desc_zh: 以色列表示，其目标是一名哈马斯指挥官，该指挥官的前任在五月初的一次类似袭击中被杀。

items.title_en: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局公布了建造永久月球基地的下一步措施
items.desc_en: Nasa plans to send hopping drones and roving vehicles to the Moon as part of plans for a permanent Moon base.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局计划将跳跃无人机和漫游车发送到月球，作为永久月球基地计划的一部分。

items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: What is the role of a teacher once AI arrives in the school classroom?
items.desc_zh: 当人工智能走进学校课堂后，老师的角色是什么？

items.title_en: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
items.title_zh: 伊朗谴责美国空袭“严重违反”停火协议
items.desc_en: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.
items.desc_zh: 袭击发生时，伊朗和卡塔尔谈判代表正在多哈进行和平谈判。

items.title_en: Government vows to bring in under-16 social media restrictions by end of year
items.title_zh: 政府誓言年底前对 16 岁以下儿童实施社交媒体限制
items.desc_en: Tech minister Liz Kendall told the BBC the government would publish a response to the consultation in the summer.
items.desc_zh: 科技部长莉兹·肯德尔 (Liz Kendall) 告诉英国广播公司 (BBC)，政府将在夏季发布对此次咨询的回应。

items.title_en: The rise of the fruit that tastes like custard
items.title_zh: 味道像奶油冻的水果的兴起
items.desc_en: Custard apple plants are prized for their hardiness but exporting their delicate fruit is difficult.
items.desc_zh: 番荔枝植物因其耐寒性而受到重视，但出口其精致的果实却很困难。

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.title_zh: baz.studio
items.desc_en: Skills library & video editor for AI Agents
items.desc_zh: AI 代理的技能库和视频编辑器

items.title_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 推迟了星际飞船的发射
items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.title_en: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为
items.desc_en: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.
items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
items.title_zh: Meta 与美国学区解决社交媒体成瘾案
items.desc_en: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.
items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。
